title: Crispy Midnight Syrian Squid Grill
description: Sweet and tender baby squid, grilled to perfection in a sattvic-friendly Syrian-inspired dish, best served hot with crusty flatbread.

ingredients.name: baby squid
ingredients.notes: fresh and sustainable, cleaned and patted dry

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a neutral-tasting, high-quality olive oil for best flavor

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: freshly squeezed or bottled, use sparingly to avoid over-salting

ingredients.name: paprika
ingredients.notes: sweet or smoked, either variety works well for this dish

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: minced or crushed, depending on your preference

ingredients.name: pita bread
ingredients.notes: optional, but highly recommended for serving

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt or kosher salt for best flavor

instructions: Preheat the kadhai or grill to medium-high heat (around 400°F).
Rinse the baby squid under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
Cut the squid into bite-sized pieces and place them in a bowl.
Drizzle the olive oil over the squid, then sprinkle the minced garlic and smoked paprika on top.
